name: SynapsePay Autonomous Agent
description: Runs scheduled SAP discovery, Ace Data Cloud AI execution, Sentinel verification, and x402 payment settlement without human approval inside configured policy limits.

capabilities.description: Discover SAP tools and agents before selecting execution services.
Execute at least three distinct AI service capabilities through Ace Data Cloud.
Generate payment receipts for each paid service call.
Call Synapse Sentinel once per workflow run for audit evidence.
